interview_trace.question: Can you describe a time when you had to integrate multiple systems or services to automate a complex business process?
Can you walk me through a specific scenario where you would use multi-agent workflows to automate a complex business process?
How do you handle concurrent execution of tasks within a multi-agent workflow, and what synchronization mechanisms would you use to prevent data inconsistencies?
Can you walk me through your thought process when deciding on the communication mechanism between agents in your multi-agent workflow?
